message.content:
Update the ST40 project's resource files to add LED image resources (0-50.png through 15-50.png and 0 Filled-50.png through 15 Filled-50.png, plus 0-501.png through 7-501.png).

Project path: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\SP3 MECA LH RH\SP2i MECA_SP3 추가\ST40\
RootNamespace: S50

1. Read the S50 project's Resources.resx and Resources.Designer.vb for reference:
   - S50 path: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC_INDIA_1\KY FRT CUSH\S50\My Project\

2. Update ST40's Resources.resx (at My Project\Resources.resx) - add all LED image entries (0-50 through 15-50, 0 Filled-50 through 15 Filled-50) before the closing </root> tag. Keep existing entries.

3. Update ST40's Resources.Designer.vb (at My Project\Resources.Designer.vb) - add all the LED image properties. Read S50's version first to get the exact format.

The LED PNG files have already been copied to ST40\Resources\ folder.
Only edit files, do not create new files. Code comments in English.
